ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "overall" INTEGER /* Overall rating of the player */,
  "potential" INTEGER /* Potential rating of the player */,
  "club" TEXT /* Club the player plays for */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the player */,
  "wage" INTEGER /* Weekly wage of the player */,
  "special" INTEGER /* Special ability of the player (e.g., free kicks, penalties) */,
  "preferred_foot" TEXT /* Preferred foot of the player (left, right) */,
  "international_reputation" INTEGER /* International reputation of the player (1-5) */,
  "weak_foot" INTEGER /* Weak foot rating of the player (1-5) */,
  "skill_moves" INTEGER /* Number of skill moves the player has */,
  "work_rate" TEXT /* Work rate of the player (low, medium, high) */,
  "body_type" TEXT /* Body type of the player (normal, stocky, lean) */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position the player plays (e.g., striker, midfielder, defender) */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "joined" TEXT /* Date the player joined the club */,
  "contract_valid_until" TEXT /* Date the player's contract is valid until */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the player in cm */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in kg */,
  "dominant_foot" TEXT /* Dominant foot of the player (left, right) */,
  "player_agent" TEXT /* Name of the player's agent */,
  "player_contract_length" INTEGER /* Length of the player's contract in years */,
  "player_market_value" REAL /* Market value of the player */,
  "player_release_clause" REAL /* Release clause of the player's contract */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_nationality FOREIGN KEY ("nationality") REFERENCES national_teams ("country"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_position FOREIGN KEY ("position") REFERENCES player_positions ("position_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_club FOREIGN KEY ("club") REFERENCES clubs ("club_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "clubs" (
  "club_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each club */,
  "club_name" TEXT /* Name of the club */,
  "league" TEXT /* League the club plays in */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country the club is from */,
  "club_value" REAL /* Value of the club */,
  "club_reputation" INTEGER /* Reputation of the club (1-5) */,
  "club_stadium" TEXT /* Name of the club's stadium */,
  "club_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the club's stadium */,
  "club_sponsor" TEXT /* Name of the club's sponsor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("club_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country the league is from */,
  "league_level" INTEGER /* Level of the league (1-5) */,
  "league_reputation" INTEGER /* Reputation of the league (1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "national_teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each national team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the national team */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country the national team is from */,
  "team_reputation" INTEGER /* Reputation of the national team (1-5) */,
  "team_ranking" INTEGER /* Ranking of the national team (1-100) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "position_name" TEXT /* Name of the position (e.g., striker, midfielder, defender) */,
  "position_description" TEXT /* Description of the position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "skills" (
  "skill_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each skill */,
  "skill_name" TEXT /* Name of the skill (e.g., dribbling, passing) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the skill */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("skill_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_skills" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "skill_id" INTEGER /* ID of the skill */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the player for the skill (1-100) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id", "skill_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attributes" (
  "attribute_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attribute */,
  "attribute_name" TEXT /* Name of the attribute (e.g., acceleration, sprint speed) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the attribute */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attribute_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_attributes" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "attribute_id" INTEGER /* ID of the attribute */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the player for the attribute (1-100) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id", "attribute_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date the injury occurred */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury (e.g., muscle strain, broken bone) */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the injury in days */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transfers" (
  "transfer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transfer */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "from_club" TEXT /* Club the player transferred from */,
  "to_club" TEXT /* Club the player transferred to */,
  "transfer_date" TEXT /* Date the transfer occurred */,
  "transfer_fee" REAL /* Transfer fee paid for the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transfer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transfers_from_club FOREIGN KEY ("from_club") REFERENCES clubs ("club_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transfers_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transfers_to_club FOREIGN KEY ("to_club") REFERENCES clubs ("club_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "opponent" TEXT /* Opponent the player played against */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Minutes the player played in the game */,
  "goals_scored" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the player in the game */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists made by the player in the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "shots_on_target" INTEGER /* Number of shots on target by the player */,
  "shots_off_target" INTEGER /* Number of shots off target by the player */,
  "passes_completed" INTEGER /* Number of passes completed by the player */,
  "passes_attempted" INTEGER /* Number of passes attempted by the player */,
  "tackles_won" INTEGER /* Number of tackles won by the player */,
  "tackles_lost" INTEGER /* Number of tackles lost by the player */,
  "dribbles_completed" INTEGER /* Number of dribbles completed by the player */,
  "dribbles_attempted" INTEGER /* Number of dribbles attempted by the player */,
  "fouls_committed" INTEGER /* Number of fouls committed by the player */,
  "fouls_suffered" INTEGER /* Number of fouls suffered by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id", "game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the coach */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the coach */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the coach */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience of the coach */,
  "reputation" INTEGER /* Reputation of the coach (1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaching_history" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coach */,
  "club_id" INTEGER /* ID of the club */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the coach started coaching the club */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the coach stopped coaching the club */,
  "win_percentage" REAL /* Win percentage of the coach at the club */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id", "club_id", "start_date")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_coaches" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coach */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the coach started coaching the player */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the coach stopped coaching the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id", "coach_id", "start_date")
)
